install.errorNoTarget: This entry has no installable target.
install.oauthRequired: Authorize this server to enable its tools.

installed.title: MCP Library - Installed
installed.customNoDetail: Custom servers don't have a detail page yet.
installed.empty: No MCPs installed yet. Browse the library to add one.
installed.removeConfirm: Remove {{name}} from your library? This will also uninstall it from all CLI agents.
installed.reconnectToast: Reconnecting {{name}} - agents will pick it up on the next message.
installed.issueAuthTitle: This connection needs you to sign in again
installed.issueAuthFix: Sign in to reconnect. Your tools come back as soon as it authorizes.
installed.issueErrorFix: Check the server is running and reachable, then retry.

browse.emptyFilter: No connectors match your search and filters.

card.removeBody: This removes {{name}} and its config from your agents. You can re-add it any time.

byo.title: Connect {{vendor}} - paste OAuth credentials
byo.universalIntro: {{vendor}} does not allow Wayland to auto-register an OAuth client. Register an OAuth app on the vendor's developer console and paste the credentials below.
byo.redirectLabel: Redirect URI to paste in the vendor console:
byo.clientIdPlaceholder: Paste the client_id from the vendor console

urlAdd.title: Add an MCP server
urlAdd.subtitle: Paste a link from the vendor. Wayland detects how to connect and signs you in.
urlAdd.hint: Paste a server URL from the vendor. Wayland detects the transport and sign-in for you.
urlAdd.needsAuth: This server needs you to sign in
urlAdd.tokenPlaceholder: Paste an API key / access token
urlAdd.advancedHeader: Uses a custom header? (e.g. Readwise X-Access-Token)
urlAdd.invalidUrl: Enter a valid https:// server URL.
urlAdd.unreachable: Could not reach that server. Check the URL and try again.
urlAdd.tokenRejected: The server rejected that token. Double-check it and retry.
